# OMN-14436 -- DoD runner grandfather ratchet.
#
# Every ticket whose contract existed when run_contract_compliance_check.py
# began executing check_values against the PRODUCT workspace instead of the
# onex_change_control clone. Until that fix, a check_value's cwd was the receipt
# store, so the only files an author could reach were the receipt and the
# contract itself. The corpus below was authored under that constraint and is
# grandfathered: its checks still EXECUTE and are REPORTED in the job log, but a
# failure is demoted BLOCK -> WARN so enabling the runner does not wedge
# in-flight work on pre-existing debt.
#
# A ticket NOT in this list is ENFORCED from its first PR.
#
# This is a RATCHET: the list may only SHRINK. tests/test_dod_runner_ratchet.py
# pins the count and fails if it grows. There is deliberately NO expiry date --
# an expiry would manufacture paydown pressure on a corpus that RSD (OMN-14427)
# is slated to delete outright. Do not add entries; remove them as contracts are
# rewritten to observe the product.
#
# Generated: 2026-07-11 from contracts/ at aa33fb3863c5716f46424f56089a072b8ab24b4f
# Regenerate: python scripts/ci/generate_dod_legacy_allowlist.py
# Count: 6919
